name: PolarMemory
description: Agent 长期记忆模块：将 KnowLever Wiki 转换为高密度 Block 格式，提供 Agent 消费接口

requirements.need: Wiki→Block 转换与 Block 管理
requirements.approach: wiki_converter 读取 KnowLever Wiki 目录，解析 YAML frontmatter + Markdown，压缩为高密度 Block；BlockManager 提供 wikiToBlock/batchConvert/rankByImportance/sync 方法

features.name: Block 数据结构
behavior: Block 接口定义：label, value, tokens, read_only, source_wiki, created_at, updated_at
read_only 根据源 Wiki 的 status=done 或 confidence>=0.9 自动标记
tokens 按 value 长度/4 估算
Block 支持 13 种 type（entity/preference/fact/goal/relationship/event/concept/procedure/emotion/decision/skill/context/meta），新增 temporal/confidence/source/entity_refs 可选字段
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: Wiki→Block 转换器
features.description: 读取 KnowLever Wiki 目录，解析 frontmatter + body，压缩为 Block
behavior: 解析 YAML frontmatter 提取 id/title/summary/confidence/tags 等元数据
压缩 body：移除标题行，合并正文为单行高密度文本
递归扫描 wiki/ 目录下所有 .md 文件
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: BlockManager
features.description: Block 生命周期管理：转换、批量转换、重要性排序、同步
behavior: wikiToBlock(user, topic) 从 KnowLever Wiki 转换为 Block
batchConvert(user, topics[]) 批量转换多个 topic
rankByImportance(query, topK) 按关键词匹配度排序
sync(user, topic) 增量同步，返回 added/updated 计数
JSON 文件持久化到 data/ 目录
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

requirements.need: Agent 消费 API 接口
requirements.approach: Express HTTP 服务，提供 /api/blocks/search、/api/blocks/convert、/api/blocks/sync 三个端点

features.name: /api/blocks/search
features.description: Block 检索接口，供 PolarClaw 调用获取长期记忆
behavior: POST /api/blocks/search 接受 { query, top_k? } 参数
返回 { blocks: Block[], total, query } 格式
按关键词匹配度 + read_only 加权排序
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: /api/blocks/convert
behavior: POST /api/blocks/convert 接受 { user, topic } 参数
返回 { blocks: Block[], count } 格式
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: /api/blocks/sync
features.description: 与 KnowLever Wiki 增量同步
behavior: POST /api/blocks/sync 接受 { user, topic } 参数
返回 { synced, added, updated } 格式
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

requirements.need: Typed Block + Temporal Validity + Conflict Detection
requirements.approach: 扩展 Block 接口（13 种 type schema），新增 temporal 时间维度字段，实现 detectConflicts 冲突检测方法，新增 upsert/delete/get API 端点

features.name: Block typed schema
behavior: Block 支持 13 种 type（entity/preference/fact/goal/relationship/event/concept/procedure/emotion/decision/skill/context/meta）
Block 新增 temporal/confidence/source/entity_refs 可选字段
search 支持按 type 过滤和 temporal_valid 检查
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: Conflict detection
behavior: detectConflicts 方法检测 contradiction/staleness/ambiguity 三类冲突
upsert API 自动触发冲突检测并返回 conflicts 数组
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: Block CRUD API
behavior: POST /api/blocks/upsert 创建或更新 Block
POST /api/blocks/delete 删除 Block
GET /api/blocks/:label 获取单个 Block
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

depends_on: KnowLever Wiki 产物（只读 data/users/{user}/topics/{topic}/wiki/）
